channel.title: Nxea on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in Nxea on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 22157403991
item.description:
Ergh. Stuck on a train in Whittlesford. Can’t go forwards because of broken rails, can’t go back because of the points. Dammit. #nxea

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 21928349664
item.description:
#NXEA unable to tell difference between hot and wet. It’s been raining, so naturally heating on 1758 to Kings Lynn has been set to ‘sauna’

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 21685901747
item.description:
Aagh, am sitting in the carriage for the hard of hearing. Subtitles are working, surely they could turn the announcement volume down? #nxea

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0
